name: Job Application Tracker
description: Capture job postings and detect new portals. Reads only visible page metadata (Open Graph / meta tags) — never cookies or credentials.
_comment_host_permissions: http://localhost:8080/* is the backend gateway. <all_urls> lets the content script read visible metadata on any job page; this could be narrowed to a curated portal list once the known-portal domains are stable.
_comment_externally_connectable: http://localhost/* is the local Vite dev server (Chrome match patterns do NOT support ports, so the :5173 is intentionally omitted — it matches localhost on any port). The web app calls chrome.runtime.sendMessage(EXTENSION_ID, {type:'SET_JWT', jwt}) after login to bridge the JWT into the extension. For production, add the deployed web-app origin (e.g. https://app.example.com/*) to this matches list.
_comment_icons: Squirrel logo PNGs live in icons/ (16/32/48/128). Chrome toolbar icons must be raster PNG (not SVG); icons/squirrel.svg is the vector source.
